title: Another On Her. (Julia)
content:
How can I choose but love and follow her
    Whose shadow smells like milder pomander?
    How can I choose but kiss her, whence does come
    The storax, spikenard, myrrh, and laudanum?

    Pomander, ball of scent.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Another On Her. (Julia)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
